name: codex-timed-loop
description: Installs global Codex loop hooks that keep long-running work active until a time or rounds target is met.

interface.shortDescription: Global loop hooks for time- or rounds-based work.
interface.longDescription: Bundles a bootstrap skill plus managed global hook templates that install codex-loop behavior under ~/.codex/ for minimum-duration work or repeated rounds.
defaultPrompt: Install the Codex Timed Loop plugin globally on this machine.
Set up global codex-loop hooks for repeated QA and long-running implementation work.
